pageDescription: Hands-on AI projects showcasing agentic systems, medical imaging, and generative models.

items.title: Agentic AI Technical Interviewer
items.description: Stateful AI agent that conducts dynamic technical interviews with intent routing and structured evaluation.
highlights: Robust state machine for conversation loops

items.title: MedAssist-LLM-iPhone (Offline Medical QA)
items.description: Fine-tuned Qwen2.5-0.5B-Instruct on medical QA dataset with LoRA, optimized for fully offline inference on iPhone via GGUF quantization and llama.cpp.
highlights: On-device LLM inference without cloud dependency
Optimized memory usage for mobile deployment

items.title: Real-Time Vision + LLM Agent (LLM with Eyes)
items.description: Autonomous vision agent integrating YOLO11 object detection with Gemini 2.5 Flash for contextual reasoning about visual environments in real-time.

items.title: Synthetic Face Dataset Generation (GANs + Diffusion)
items.description: Hybrid generative pipeline combining StyleGAN2-ADA and SDXL+LoRA to study dataset effects on synthetic face generation for controlled vision experiments.
highlights: Adaptive Discriminator Augmentation for small datasets
Quality evaluation framework for generative consistency

items.title: LangGraph MCP Agent + XAMPP MySQL Integration
items.description: Modular LangGraph-powered MCP server with FastAPI backend and MySQL integration for intelligent document management and AI-driven query workflows.
highlights: File upload pipeline with metadata indexing

items.title: Bangla Sign Language Translator
items.description: Vision-based Bangla sign language recognition system translating hand gestures into Bangla alphabets and spoken words using MediaPipe + CNN.
highlights: Real-time gesture detection with hand landmarks
ESP32/Raspberry Pi deployment for assistive tech

items.title: Googler Search Agent
items.description: Autonomous AI search agent retrieving web results and generating concise summaries using local LLMs via Ollama + LangGraph orchestration.

items.title: Prompt-Based Dynamic LLM Selector
items.description: Intelligent routing system selecting optimal locally-hosted LLM (Gemma3, DeepSeek-R1) based on prompt complexity to balance accuracy and compute cost.
highlights: Dynamic model selection based on prompt analysis

items.title: DeepLearning-with-PyTorch
items.description: Foundational deep learning implementations for image classification using CNNs on MNIST/FashionMNIST with optimization experiments.

items.title: AI-Based Plagiarism Detection
items.description: Privacy-preserving system detecting AI-generated text using on-device LLMs and NLP classification techniques without cloud dependency.

items.title: AI-Powered Study Assistant Chatbot
items.description: Educational chatbot using fine-tuned GPT-2 for student Q&A support with FastAPI backend and interactive web interface.
highlights: REST API backend with conversational AI
Interactive web interface for learning support
